business.name: Harbor & Ellis LLP
business.tagline: Practical counsel for growing companies and founders.
business.description: Business law firm focused on contracts, employment, and commercial disputes for technology and professional services clients.

hero.headline: Legal clarity for your next chapter.
hero.subheadline: From founder agreements to scaling teams—we help you move fast without blind spots.

services.name: Corporate & commercial
services.description: Incorporations, shareholder agreements, M&A support, and vendor contracts.

services.name: Employment
services.description: Offer letters, policies, terminations, and contractor classification reviews.

services.name: Disputes
services.description: Negotiation, mediation prep, and litigation oversight when matters escalate.

about.headline: Straight answers, plain language
about.body: We pair senior judgment with responsive timelines. You get a named partner, clear scopes, and invoices that match the plan.

testimonials.author: Samira K., CEO
testimonials.quote: They turned our messy vendor paper into a template library we reuse every quarter.

testimonials.author: Tom W., COO
testimonials.quote: Employment issue handled quietly and quickly. Exactly what we needed.

seo.title: Harbor & Ellis LLP | Business Law Halifax
seo.description: Halifax business law firm: corporate, employment, and disputes. Practical advice for founders and growing teams.
